feedback: The 5G experience combined with the OTT bundle makes this the most complete recharge plan I have ever used. Internet speed is consistently above 500 Mbps, streaming is buffer-free, and the included Netflix and Prime subscriptions save me over 400 rupees monthly. Exceptional value for money overall.

Network coverage is terrible and customer support refuses to acknowledge the problem. Called three times about dropped calls in my area and each time they just say reset your phone. Meanwhile billing keeps charging me full price for a service I can barely use.
plz fix ur mobile app. cant check data balance or reacharg without it crashing. also the intrenet speed has been terrible since last week in my area
SIM activation happened on time. Network started working as expected.

Roaming experience in Europe was seamless with good call quality throughout. The data validity on the international pack lasted my entire trip and the pricing was transparent with no hidden charges on the final bill. Very satisfied with every aspect of the service abroad.
Data balance drains too fast. Not matching my actual usage at all.
omg worst custmer support ever. called about sim activation delay and they transferred me 4 times. nobody knows anything. meanwhile my old sim already got deactivated so im without any service

The mobile app experience is excellent for managing everything from recharge plans to checking data balance. The interface is clean and intuitive. I particularly appreciate being able to activate roaming packs with a single tap before my trips. Well-designed digital experience.
Internet speed is average. Nothing to write home about.
ngl disappointed with the value for money on this plan. pricing went up but internet speed is same and ott bundle got reduced. not what i signed up for initially
Call quality has been crystal clear since switching. Network coverage extends well into rural areas. The 5G speed in the city is average but acceptable.
Billing is standard. No issues but nothing remarkable either.

The data validity on my recharge plan expired while I still had 4GB remaining because the 24-day period is absurdly short. Customer support said nothing can be done and the unused data is forfeited. This is terrible value for money and feels like a deliberate design to waste customer data.
OTT bundle with the plan is standard. Has the basic apps covered.
tbh ok network coverage in my area. call quality is fine most days. nothing amazing but nothing broken either. just standard average service

After activating my new SIM the internet speed was immediately impressive on 5G. I ran speed tests showing 800 Mbps consistently. The mobile app made the entire activation process smooth and the network coverage in my building is full bars on every floor.
Recharge plans are overpriced for what you get. Competitors offer more.
prblm with roaming charges on my bill. activated pack through app but got charged separately for data. custmer care says its a system error but wont refund. very frustrting experience

The value for money on the annual plan is unbeatable when you consider the included OTT subscriptions, generous data allocation, and extended validity period. I calculated the per-day cost and it works out to under 8 rupees for everything I need. Billing is always transparent too.
Customer support response was adequate. Standard interaction.
cant blv how bad the 5g coverage is outside city limits. paying premium pricing for a plan that promises 5g but only works in 2 specific spots. network coverage overall is mediocre at best

Smooth SIM activation process through the retail store. The staff helped me choose the right recharge plan for my usage pattern and even activated the OTT bundle on the spot. Was making calls within 30 minutes of walking in. Professional and efficient onboarding experience.
Data validity on the weekly plan is fine for short-term needs.
ur intrenet speed is a joke. paying for 5g plan but getting 4g speeds at best. data balance also seems wrong every time i check. prblm after prblm with this carrier

I appreciate the transparency in billing and the flexibility of recharge plan options. The pricing structure makes sense and the data validity periods are clearly communicated before purchase. Customer support also helped me navigate the upgrade process smoothly when I needed more data.
Mobile app is functional but nothing special. Gets the basics done.

The roaming experience was terrible. No connectivity in Japan despite activating the pack. Call quality was non-existent and customer support took three days to even acknowledge the issue. Ended up buying a local SIM which defeats the purpose of having an international plan.
5G speeds are acceptable. Decent network performance overall.
v bad experience overall. sim activation took a week, network coverage in my building is zero, and the reacharg plan i chose gives terrible value. considering switching to competitor immediately

The pricing on the family plan is competitive and includes OTT access for all four members. Each person gets their own data balance and the billing is consolidated into one clear monthly statement. Network coverage works well across the different areas where my family lives.
Roaming packs are averagely priced. Standard offering for travelers.

omg the billing is completely wrong this month. charged 200 extra for services i never subscribed to. custmer care says they will investigate but nothing happens. data balance also shows incorrect numbers. what a mess
Call quality is decent across locations I visit. Internet speed is adequate and recharge plan pricing is average for the market. Standard overall experience.
OTT bundle is standard. Same apps every carrier offers now.
plz improve network coverage in tier 3 cities. paying same price as metro users but getting much worse service. call quality drops constantly and intrenet barely works after 6pm. not fair pricing
Data balance tracking in the app is functional. The mobile app itself is well-designed. Data validity info is displayed clearly and recharge options are standard.
SIM activation timeline was acceptable. Standard 48 hours.

The 5G rollout in my city has been genuinely impressive. Speeds are consistently above 600 Mbps and the coverage extends to most areas I frequent. Call quality on VoLTE is crystal clear and the overall value for money at the current pricing feels justified.
Internet speed fluctuates a lot. Sometimes fast sometimes crawling.
ngl the sim activation was smooth but the network coverage in my area is disappointing. 5g was promised but i only get 4g. at least call quality is decent so not a total loss
Switched after comparing recharge plans and found solid options. OTT bundle is standard, pricing is average. Billing is fine. The mobile app makes management easy.
Value for money is acceptable for what the plan offers.

The roaming experience was a disaster from start to finish. Activated the international pack through the app but it never worked abroad. Internet speed was zero, calls would not connect, and customer support kept me waiting for 40 minutes before suggesting I restart my phone. Useless.
Network coverage in the city is adequate. Calls are standard quality.

custmer support helped me find a better reacharg plan with more data balance and longer validity. also explained the ott bundle options clearly. saved me money while getting better benefits. rare good experience
Pricing is standard for the industry. Nothing out of the ordinary.

My experience with this carrier covers multiple pain points. The 5G coverage is patchy, the recharge plan I chose does not offer good value for money, and the OTT bundle only includes mobile-only tiers. On the positive side billing has always been accurate and transparent.
App works fine for quick recharges. No complaints on that front.
cant blv the data validity is only 24 days for the 249 plan. other carriers give 28 days minimum. the reacharg options need a serious revamp. losing custmers because of these stingy policies
I travel frequently and roaming coverage is solid. Call quality abroad is acceptable. Pricing is average for international packs. App activation is smooth. Data balance tracking works.
5G experience is okay in my area. Sometimes fast sometimes regular.

The billing has been wrong for three consecutive months. Data balance deductions do not match my usage. Customer support logs tickets but never follows through. Internet speed is slow on top of everything else. Paying for a premium plan and getting budget service.
Recharge plan with standard data allocation. Pricing is market average.
plz add better roaming options for african countries. currently only daily packs available which are very expensive. also the ott bundle doesnt work abroad which is disappointing for long trips

My entire family uses this carrier and we are collectively impressed by the consistency. Network coverage is strong in all our locations, call quality never falters, and the family recharge plan gives us shared OTT access with individual data balances. Great value for the household.
Data balance seems accurate. Normal consumption patterns reflected.

omg the sim activation process is ridiculous. submitted documents 5 days ago and still pending. called custmer care twice and they just say wait. meanwhile i have no working phone number. worst onboarding ever

I am happy with the overall value proposition. Internet speed is fast, 5G works in my area, and the recharge plan includes everything I need for daily use. The OTT bundle is a nice bonus and billing has never had any errors in my two years as a customer.
Roaming was fine in Dubai. Worked as expected nothing more.

The network coverage drops completely inside my office building which makes call quality unusable during work hours. I have raised this with customer support multiple times but they only offer generic troubleshooting steps. For the premium pricing I expect indoor coverage to work.
SIM activation through the app was standard. Normal digital process.
tbh ok recharge plan options. not the cheapest not the most expensive. ott bundle has the basics covered. overall a middle of the road experience with nothing to complain or praise
Upgraded to 5G and speed improvement is noticeable. Data validity of 84 days is standard. Value for money and pricing are average despite small price increase.
Call quality is passable. Standard voice clarity on most calls.
intrenet speed terrible since they upgraded tower in my area. ironic. also data balance draining faster than before. custmer support says its normal usage which is clearly not true. very prblmatic

The eSIM activation combined with instant 5G connectivity made switching to this carrier the best tech decision of the year. Everything was set up through the mobile app in under 15 minutes. Network coverage at home and office is perfect and call quality is crisp.
Recharge plan is adequate for my basic needs. Standard offering.

The value for money has completely eroded on this carrier. They reduced OTT bundle content, shortened data validity, and increased pricing all in one quarter. Billing now includes mysterious small charges that custmer support cannot explain. Switching next month.
Network coverage in the suburbs is acceptable. Standard availability.

The mobile app experience is smooth for managing recharges and tracking data balance. I can also monitor my billing history and compare recharge plans easily. However the OTT bundle section is confusing and the activation links often lead to error pages.
5G availability in my area is inconsistent. Works sometimes.
plz look into why my data balance finishes so fast on the 1.5gb plan. also the data validity of 24 days is too short. by day 20 i have no data left and have to reacharg again. terrible value
Excellent call quality and network coverage on my commute. Never experience dropped calls. 5G speeds along the highway are acceptable but nothing extraordinary.
Customer support is okay. Neither great nor terrible these days.

v bad that the ott bundle only gives mobile plans. cant watch on tv despite paying for premium reacharg. internet speed also drops during evening hours making streaming impossible even on phone. total waste of money
Chose this carrier for roaming in Southeast Asia and it worked. Call quality was acceptable in Thailand and Singapore. Data speeds were standard. Pricing was average for a 7-day trip.
Billing system works. No errors detected in recent months.

omg cant blv the sim activation is still pending after 6 days. customer support gives different answer every time. one says 24 hrs another says 72 hrs. meanwhile no phone service at all. completely unacceptable in 2024

The recharge plan structure is well thought out with clear pricing tiers. Each level up adds meaningful benefits like better OTT access, more data, and longer validity. The mobile app comparison tool makes choosing easy and billing always reflects exactly what was advertised.
Internet speed is decent for browsing. Adequate for daily tasks.

Network coverage is non-existent in my residential colony. Multiple complaints raised through the app and via customer support but zero improvement in three months. Call quality is unusable indoors and I have to step outside for every conversation. For the pricing this is robbery.
Value for money is acceptable. OTT bundle covers the basics.

ngl the roaming packs are confusing. too many options with unclear differences. activated one for my trip but data balance showed wrong numbers abroad. at least call quality was fine so i could manage

The 5G plan delivers exactly what was promised. Internet speed is consistently fast, network coverage is wide in my metro area, and the included OTT subscriptions add real value. Billing is always accurate and the recharge process through the app is seamless. Complete package.
SIM activation process is standard. Nothing noteworthy either way.

The data validity on my current plan is only 24 days which is too short. Combined with slow internet speed after the daily limit is crossed and no rollover of unused data, the value for money is terrible. My data balance always shows wastage at expiry.
Call quality on this network is acceptable. Clear enough for daily calls.

ur app is terrible for managing roaming. tried to activate international pack but it kept failing. had to call custmer care who also struggled. by the time it was sorted i was already abroad without data for half a day

The annual recharge plan with OTT bundle is the smartest purchase I have made this year. At 2999 rupees for 365 days I get 2GB daily data, unlimited calls, Netflix, Prime, and Hotstar. The per-day value is unbeatable and billing is just once a year which is incredibly convenient.
Data validity of 28 days is standard. Normal market offering.

prblm after prblm with this carrier. 5g doesnt work properly, billing shows random charges, and the ott bundle keeps deactivating itself every few weeks. custmer support just reads from a script without solving anything. zero value for the premium pricing
Network coverage across my daily commute is acceptable. Normal signal.

I appreciate the effort they put into the mobile app experience. Everything from SIM activation tracking to data balance monitoring to OTT bundle management is handled in one place. The interface is modern and responsive. Only wish the customer support chat was faster.
Recharge plan benefits are average. Nothing exceptional.

tbh the overall experience is mixed. internet speed and 5g are great in the city but network coverage falls apart in suburbs. billing is always correct which is good. value for money depends heavily on where you live

Excellent customer support experience resolving my billing concern. Agent was knowledgeable and reversed the incorrect charges immediately. Also helped me find a better recharge plan with improved OTT access and longer data validity. Everything handled in one call.
OTT bundle works. Access to streaming platforms is functional.

The complete package of fast 5G internet speed, reliable network coverage, clear call quality, and fair pricing makes this carrier my top recommendation. Add the comprehensive OTT bundle and generous data validity and you have genuine value for money that I have not found elsewhere.
Mobile app performance is acceptable. Standard functionality.

Everything about this carrier has deteriorated. SIM replacement took a week, the new connection has poor network coverage, internet speed is slow, customer support is unhelpful, and the recharge plan I was sold does not include the OTT bundle that was advertised. Total misrepresentation.
